title: Cult Of Cthulhu
description: Madness is not a curse — it is a gift. Let Cthulhu show you the way. Cultism/Occultism/Lovecraft/Horror/CIT
body:
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


![nameofmod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41802a53c27baa555d5f4bd2273ec9536c5152c5_0.webp) 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**"Cult of Cthulhu"** is a Minecraft mod that adds a **dark** and **mysterious** atmosphere to the game. It introduces creepy **decorations**, **cursed items**, and **strange changes** to the world inspired by Lovecraftian horror. The world feels more eerie and unknown with every detail.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


```
Current version: 1.3
```
Now resourse pack using a **CIT Resewn** mod for fabric. Without it there will be only limited content available.
U can download it here - https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn

**_Google docs with all the textures names and how to get them._**
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1sjSm4uiQj7NfShCarUQhFyieq5rqsxFH3N6NFl0N9RU/edit?hl=ru&gid=0#gid=0
